name: review-of-educational-research-skills
description: An agent skill stack for writing systematic reviews, meta-analyses, and critical integrative syntheses for the Review of Educational Research (RER), AERA's flagship review journal published by SAGE.

plugins.name: review-of-educational-research-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the Review of Educational Research (RER) review-article lifecycle, from scoping a synthesis-worthy question and a preregistered protocol through systematic search, the organizing framework, comprehensiveness and risk-of-bias, PRISMA/MARS transparency, submission, and revision.
